mobile.description: SMS recipient mobile number used for AESSMS

externRole.description: The element's technical role for external editing, relevant for signature fields

image.description: The annotation's tag text if type=image

publicKeyCheck.description: Public Key for integrity check of send data

required.description: Is this annotation a required field (currently only works for signatures)

role.description: The element's technical role, relevant for signature fields

signatureImageRaw.description: The signature image in raw format

signatureLevel.description: Signature level. Only present for signatures. Can be SES, AES or QES

signatureStampType.description: Signature stamp type. Only present for signatures. Can be NO_SIGNATURESTAMP, OPTIONAL_SIGNATURESTAMP or REQUIRED_SIGNATURESTAMP

size.description: The Annotation's font size if type=text

stampType.description: Company stamp type. Only present for signatures. Can be NO_STAMP, OPTIONAL_STAMP or REQUIRED_STAMP

trace.description: Stack trace in case of exceptions

type.description: The annotation's type: signature,image or text

typedText.description: The annotation's text which was typed in

time.description: Zeitpunkt an dem dieser Wert verändert wurde. Das Format hängt von 'api.datetime.format' ab

value.description: Wert der Annotation bis zum Änderungszeipunt 'time'

notification.description: ID of the message that is responsible for the call

anchor.description: css selector at which this attention dot should be appended

anchorChildWithinScrollableContainer.description: css selector for part of the element that is a child of the anchor that has to be within the scrollable container. This is the anchor by default. Only relevant if the scrollableContainer is set.

dynamicAnchor.description: Is the anchor added and removed from the dom

gap.description: Space between the attention dot's outer shadow and the anchor.

groupName.description: Name to identify attention dots of same time. Useful when there is a need for special actions on these dots.

placement.description: Defines if the attention dot is placed on the left or right of the target.

position.description: Fixed position if it shouldn't scroll or absolute if it should scroll

abschliesen.description: Indicates if the hand out occurred when completing the process

email.description: Lists the e-mail addresses to which the documents were handed out

sms.description: Lists the phone numbers to which the documents were handed out

typen.description: Indicates how the documents were handout out, i.e. e-mail, file, paper, sms

pdfEmbedBiometricDataType.description:
inSign internally keeps two different versions of each signed document.
            (A) the high fidelity variant of the signed document including all of the biometric data and digital signatures (certificates). This is the variant that should be kept in your archive. It can be access via API "/get/document?includebiodata=true" (default).
            (B) One low fidelity version that does not include the biometric data and with less digitial signatures on it. This variant will only contain the bitmap images of the handwritten signatures but they are not digitally signed. This variant shall be used to be handed out to the human users of inSign (e.g. customers). Accessible via the API "/get/document?includebiodata=false"
            When "pdfEmbedBiometricData" is set to "false" (The default value for this property) all download and handout options inside the inSign UI will deliver the variant (B, low fidelity) of the documents to the user. The high fidelity variant (A) is only accessible via the API in this case.
            For the low fidelity variant (B) of the documents inSign offers different flavors of the low fidelity document which can be chosen by the property "pdf.embedBiometricData.type".
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=skipbiodata: The low fidelity variant (B) will be exactly the same as the high fidelity variant excluding all of the biometric data but including the digital signatures for every signature.
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=flat (default): The low fidelity variant (B) will only contain the bitmaps of the hand written signatures but no digital signatures (certificates) and no biometric data.
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=flat_signed (since v3.12): The low fidelity variant (B) will only contain the bitmaps of the hand written signatures, not digital signatures (certificates) for any of the signatures and not biometric data (same as "flat"). Deviant form “flat” the document will be digitally signed with a certificate once upon download from the server (to protect it against modification and show it was created and digitally signed by inSign). This is the recommended setting if you are using a public AATL (Adobe Trust List) or EUTL (European Trusts List) based certificate for digitally signing documents. If you are using a self-signed certificate you should prefer setting "flat".

callbackURL.description: This URL is called from the browser window upon completion of the session. i.e. when the user leaves the session. URLs starting with '/' or '.', are interpreted as context relative, will be interpreted as absolute otherwise.

callbackURLForAbschliessen.description: This URL is called from the browser window upon completion of the session. i.e. when the user leaves the session. URLs starting with '/' or '.', are interpreted as context relative, will be interpreted as absolute otherwise. If you fill callbackURL only, callbackURLForAbschliessen will be set to the same value automatically

companystampAllowed.description: Should the form editor have a property to allow setting the stamp type for a signature? If this is set to false, the stamp type will default to 'NO_STAMP' and the user will not be able to upload a company stamp. Since 3.47

discardBiodata.description: Discard biodata for signatures and don't add them to the pdf when sinning. Since 3.37

displaycustomer.description: Name of the customer this session is allocated to

displayname.description: Name of the session. Will be displayed as the title in the UI and used for E-Mail subjects, and downloaded files-names

documents.description: Documents and metadata of the documents that will belong to this session. Document binaries may be provided as Base64 encoded inside this structure or binaries might be uploaded after session creation via a seperate api which is the prefered method in terms of used bandwith

examinerMailComment.description: Add a release comment to emails to all participants? Only affects processes with order.

externAllowSignerGroups.description: Can multiple signers be assigned to a signature field?

externAttachVVG.description: Override application wide setting 'extern.attachvvg'. since v3.7.

externCompleteOnFinish.description: Should the process be completed when the external caller ends processing? Since 3.27

externEditAllowed.description: Can externuser for this session edit textfields and checkboxes? Since 3.28

externEmailBetreff.description: Betreff der Email zur Externen Bearbeitung.. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.externEmailBetreff.

This is used when the customer does not receive e-mails with access data but accesses them via single sign-on (see JSONStartExtern). since v3.8.

externLoginRequired.description: Are external Users reuqired to log in in with a password? If set to false users only need to click the supplied link. Otherwise an additional password will be supplied via email/sms or phone. since v3.8

externPerSms.description:
The external user receives one sms with the link to edit the process online. This link gives him direkt access to the process.
            He won`t receive any mails or a sms with the password. Also no reminder mails are send.

externPhotoUploadEnabled.description: Enable upload of photo documents for external users. since v3.6.

externRejectReasonOptions.description: A string containing a JSON array that defines the options displayed in the 'Reason for Rejection' dropdown of the signatory's reject process dialog. Each array element contains a 'value' (The options's value), a 'label' map where the keys are language codes and the values are the localized display texts of the option, and an optional 'mandatoryComment' (If mandatory comment is true, the comment field is made mandatory when that option is selected. Default is false).eg [{"value": "optionValue1","label": { "en": "Reason 1", "de": "Grund 1" }, "mandatoryComment": true},{"value": "optionValue2","label": { "en": "Reason 2", "de": "Grund 2" }}]. Set empty string or null for no dropdown to be shown.  Since 3.76.

externSendDocsOnFinish.description: Should the documents be sent to the consultant when exiting the external mode? Since 3.27

externSendDocsOnFinishCustomer.description: Should the documents be sent to the customer when external process has been finished? Since 3.27

externSignAddition.description: List of signature additions separated by comma from which the process owner can choose one or none for each recipient. This addition will be added to all signatures of the recipient.

externUploadEnabled.description: Enable upload of arbitrary documents for external users

externUserGuidance.description: Should the external user be guided through the signing process? Requires 'gui.afterSignOpenNextSignatureField=false'

externWatcherAvailable.description: Can a watcher be added when preparing a process for external processing? This extern user can only observe the process.

externalPropertiesURL.description: URL to external properties- or css-file containting variables (properties-file-ending) or CSS-content (css-file-ending)

forceDownloadVVG.description: Force the external user to download the mandatory documents? Since 3.20

forceDsgvoEinwilligungPdfText.description: Should the dsgvo.einwilligung.pdf or dsgvo.einwilligung.pdf.extern text be shown in the pdf for AES even when the gdpr.popup.active=false? Since 3.67

forgroup.description: Group owner ID of this session. Must be unambiguously mapped to the owning group (i.e. groupid). Only important if the processes should be accessable for other group members. Since v3.23

foruser.description: Owner ID of this session. Must be unambiguously mapped to the owning user (i.e. userid of the user starting this session)

gdprMobileFontsize.description: Font size for mobile gdpr dialog. Only relevant for apps if gdprTarget is mobile. Since 3.41

gdprPopupActive.description: GDPR Mode active? Show GDPR notification before signing. since v3.8.29.

gdprPopupExternonly.description: Should only the external user be asked for GDPR consent? Default is false. In this case the session owner will not be asked for GDPR consent before the first signature. If true then gdprPopupActive should also be true.

gdprPopupOnce.description: Should the popup be only shown once? Otherwise will show the popup for every field. If true then gdpr.popup.active should also be true, gdpr.role will override this.

gdprRole.description: Should the DSGVO (English GDPR) popup be displayed for every role?

gdprTarget.description: Where should the general data protection dialog appear? Possible Values: web, mobile. Since 3.39

guiProperties.description:
Map of UI configuration values. You may also override any application text from mymessages.properties here. Use message.<messageid> or <language>.message.<messageid> as key, where language is de,en,fr and alike. You may find all valid messageids in mymessages.properties. Valid values: 
|key (coresponding global property)|description
|----------------------------------|-----------
|quicktipsTutorialEnabled (quicktips.tutorial.enabled)|Should Quick-Tips tutorial be displayed? Only relevant if quicktips.enabled=true
|guiNoGPS (gui.noGPS)|Should the location of tablets/mobile devices NOT be queried in the browser?
|settingsSaveForAutocompleteAvailable (settings.saveForAutocomplete.available)|Should the "E-Mail cache" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?            Works only if "mail.saveForAutocompleteFilter" is set.
|guiOnnextopentosign (gui.onnextopentosign)|When clicking on "next signature" or on the external guidance arrow in the PDF editor, immediately open the pairing dialog?        
|vorgangsverwaltungExternDelayReminderAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.extern.delay.reminder.available)|Should the "Send reminder" option be available in the process management? This option is shown only for processes where extern.per.sms=false and the statuses are "Signature requested" or "To edit".
|settingsExternMultiShowOtherSignaturefieldsAvailable (settings.extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields.available)|Should "Email address visibility" be available in the Settings to all gallery users? Can be configured on a global level with extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields. For more details look at the description there.
|vorgangsverwaltungDownloadBiometricDocsAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.downloadBiometricDocs.available)|Should the option "Download incl. signature data" be available in the process management?        
|helpAvailable (help.available)|Is the action "help" available?
|addMarkFavDefault (add.mark.fav.default)|Is the "Add Marker" action favored?
|vorgangsverwaltungActionAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.action.available)|Is the action "Process Manager" available?
|finishFile (finish.file)|Is the action "Deliver by data carrier at completion of transaction" available?
|aushaendigenMustbereadAvailable (aushaendigen.mustberead.available)|Is the action "Hand over mandatory documents" available?
|finishAvailable (finish.available)|Is the "Complete process" action available?
|settingsImprintLinkAvailable (settings.imprintLink.available)|Should the "Imprint Link" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|changeSessionNameOnFirstUpload (change.session.name.on.first.upload)|If set to true then the session name would be changed with the first upload name
|guiDisableMonitorChoice (gui.disableMonitorChoice)|Should the manual screen selection be suppressed?
|saveAsTemplateAvailable (save.as.template.available)|Is the action "Save as template" available?
|externUserGuidance (extern.user.guidance)|Should the external user be guided through the signing process? Requires 'gui.afterSignOpenNextSignatureField=false'
|addFotoFavDefault (add.foto.fav.default)|Is the action "Photograph document" favored?
|externDelegateAvailable (extern.delegate.available)|Is the action "Delegate" available for a customer? With the delegate Action a customer can redirect the process to another person.
|settingsRealLocationAvailable (settings.realLocation.available)|Should the "Location" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users? This setting requires that "Timestamp" is also available, otherwise nothing will be printed.
|vorgangsverwaltungDeleteAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.delete.available)|Should the "Delete" option be available in the process management?
|guiAfterSignOpenNextSignatureField (gui.afterSignOpenNextSignatureField)|When clicking on "next signature" in the PDF editor, switch to signature mode immediately and open            the next signature field immediately after the signature has been completed.        
|nextSignFavDefault (next.sign.fav.default)|Is the action "Next signature" favored?
|zoomFavDefault (zoom.fav.default)|Is the action "Zoom in, zoom out" favored?
|externDeleteLastSignature (extern.deleteLastSignature)|Extern-User has the abilty to delete his last signature. Not possible for multi signature.
|guiFertigbuttonSkipModalDialog (gui.fertigbutton.skipModalDialog)|If you click on "Done", no modal dialog is displayed.
|sessionExternAddformfieldUserdecision (session.extern.addformfield.userdecision)|Is the consultant allowed to activate / deactivate functionality to add formfields for external users. Only allows editing of textfields and checkboxes. addformfield.available must be true.
|searchAvailable (search.available)|Is the action "Next signature text" available?
|guiEmbeddedHotspotdisabled (gui.embedded.hotspotdisabled)|Disable all features for hotspot (embeddedMode only)
|formfieldSizeAes (formfield.size.aes)|            The default and minimal sizes for AES (handwriting) signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|formfieldSizeAessms (formfield.size.aessms)|            The default and minimal sizes for AESSMS (text input with mobile number verification) signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|guiHintAllsigned (gui.hint.allsigned)|Show hint popup for saving after last signature?
|dualscreenGuiAvailable (dualscreen.gui.available)|Is the action "Dualscreen" available? THIS Property is unfinished. Don't use it!
|settingsAvailable (settings.available)|Is the "Settings" action available?
|guiHintAllsignedSkipSaveDialog (gui.hint.allsigned.skipSaveDialog)|Don't show hint popup for saving after last signature and jump directly to final dialog instead?        
|guiTemplateWeblinkAvailable (gui.template.weblink.available)|This feature requires the license "weblink".            Process manager / Gallery: Allow the creation of "weblinks", i.e. embeddable links to templates where users can start a process themselves.        
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionDefault (password.transmission.userdecision.default)|The default selection for the user decision dropdown
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionAlternativemail_enabled (password.transmission.userdecision.alternativemail_enabled)|Should 'password via email' be an option given to the user? When the user selects this, the password will be sent via email.
|systemcheckIgnoreconnect (systemcheck.ignoreconnect)|Check the connection to the local instance. True will do the check, false will disable it.
|settingsPrivacyLinkAvailable (settings.privacyLink.available)|Should the "Privacy Link" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|quicktipsEnabled (quicktips.enabled)|Should Quick-Tips be displayed?
|settingsCompanystampUploadAvailable (settings.companystamp.upload.available)|Should the "Companystamp upload" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|documentVisibilityRegex (document.visibility.regex)|            Default visibility rules based on pairs {docregex},{recipientregex} separated by semicolon.            Only relevant if document.visibility.available is true.            Documents whose display name matches a {docregex} will only be visible to signatories matching {recipientregex}.            However, signatories can always see the documents they are assigned to.            Documents that do not match a {docregex} will be visible to all recipients.            Example: invisible.*,onlyme@example.org;.*partvisibile.*,.*@example.org;noone.*,        
|consultantRenameDocuments (consultant.rename.documents)|Is the Consultant allowed to rename documents? Not possible for sessions via API.
|settingsForcedSigfieldsAvailable (settings.forced.sigfields.available)|Should the "Mandatory Fields" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|nextSignAvailable (next.sign.available)|Is the "Next Signature" action available?
|externMultiOrderDefault (extern.multi.order.default)|If extern.multi.available = true, then the order should be specified. Default is false (no            order).            Note: If the QES button is favoured in the session, then through online editing the signatures will be availed to each extern user in order.            Hence, extern.multi.available = true is always considered and the property value will be ignored.        
|pageOverlayAvailable (page.overlay.available)|Is the "No release" action for the process creator available?
|searchFavDefault (search.fav.default)|Is the action "Next signature text" favored?
|guiLeavepagewarning (gui.leavepagewarning)|Show a warning in the browser when leaving the page?
|transmissionUserdecisionGroup (transmission.userdecision.group)|Will be removed in an upcoming version. Enables userdecision and no password option for members of the specified groups regardless of the password.transmission.userdecision setting. Multiple groups can be split by ",". For SAML the groups before mapping will be applied.
|sessionExternFormfillingUserdecision (session.extern.formfilling.userdecision)|Is the consultant allowed to activate / deactivate functionality to enable form filling for external users. This overwrites extern.edit.allowed
|burgerAvailable (burger.available)|Is the "More Functions" dropdown in the sidebar for non favorite actions available? In mobile view the burger will always be available but only contain favorite actions if this is disabled.
|passwordTransmissionUserdecision (password.transmission.userdecision)|Should the user be able to choose the way in which the password is sent? If no Option is active it will be treated as if all options are active. Will override extern.per.sms, sendtan.sms and sendtan.muendlich. mail.zip has to be true to prevent password protecting signed PDFs because this would invalidate the signatures. session.aushaendigenpflicht has to be set to false.
|settingsMaskAuditreportAvailable (settings.mask.auditreport.available)|Should "Email address masking" be available in the Settings to all gallery users?
|settingsSignaturestampUploadAvailable (settings.signaturestamp.upload.available)|Should the "Signature upload" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|addformfieldAllowAesSms (addformfield.allowAesSms)|Can signature fields be created that only require text input (mobile number verification involved)? In those fields the user can sign a document by only putting in his name.        
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionSms_enabled (password.transmission.userdecision.sms_enabled)|Should 'password via SMS' be an option given to the user? When the user selects this, the password will be sent via sms after the link is clicked.
|nextMarkFavDefault (next.mark.fav.default)|Is the "Next selection" action favored?
|aushaendigenSms (aushaendigen.sms)|Is the "Deliver documents by SMS" action available? This option is only allowed if            sendtan.sms=true. For SMS messages the mode document.email.download=true is always used, because SMS cannot            contain attachments. If there is an obligation to confirm the delivery (flag handset obligation to confirm            at the interface), the mode handset.confirm.mode=download is always used for sending SMS messages.        
|dualscreenFavDefault (dualscreen.fav.default)|Is the action "Dualscreen" favored?
|formfieldSizeQesIdnow (formfield.size.qes.idnow)|            The default and minimal sizes for QES IDNow signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|quicktipsResetDays (quicktips.reset.days)|            After how many days will Standard Quick-Tips that were disabled by clicking the 'X' be active again? pdfEmbedBiometricDataType.description:
inSign internally keeps two different versions of each signed document.
            (A) the high fidelity variant of the signed document including all of the biometric data and digital signatures (certificates). This is the variant that should be kept in your archive. It can be access via API "/get/document?includebiodata=true" (default).
            (B) One low fidelity version that does not include the biometric data and with less digitial signatures on it. This variant will only contain the bitmap images of the handwritten signatures but they are not digitally signed. This variant shall be used to be handed out to the human users of inSign (e.g. customers). Accessible via the API "/get/document?includebiodata=false"
            When "pdfEmbedBiometricData" is set to "false" (The default value for this property) all download and handout options inside the inSign UI will deliver the variant (B, low fidelity) of the documents to the user. The high fidelity variant (A) is only accessible via the API in this case.
            For the low fidelity variant (B) of the documents inSign offers different flavors of the low fidelity document which can be chosen by the property "pdf.embedBiometricData.type".
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=skipbiodata: The low fidelity variant (B) will be exactly the same as the high fidelity variant excluding all of the biometric data but including the digital signatures for every signature.
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=flat (default): The low fidelity variant (B) will only contain the bitmaps of the hand written signatures but no digital signatures (certificates) and no biometric data.
            pdfEmbedBiometricDataType=flat_signed (since v3.12): The low fidelity variant (B) will only contain the bitmaps of the hand written signatures, not digital signatures (certificates) for any of the signatures and not biometric data (same as "flat"). Deviant form “flat” the document will be digitally signed with a certificate once upon download from the server (to protect it against modification and show it was created and digitally signed by inSign). This is the recommended setting if you are using a public AATL (Adobe Trust List) or EUTL (European Trusts List) based certificate for digitally signing documents. If you are using a self-signed certificate you should prefer setting "flat".

sendtanmail.description: Should the access password be sent in a separate message (SMS/E-Mail) to the same recipients as the signed documents?

serverSidecallbackURL.description: This webhook will be called (HTTP-GET) from the inSign server on any event regarding this session. The eventID will be passed as URL-parameter 'eventid'. Possible eventIDs are EXTERNBEARBEITUNGFERTIG=all external users have finished editing, VORGANGABGESCHLOSSEN=session has been finished, SIGNATURERSTELLT=signature has ben created, SESSIONREMINDER=reminder event for stale sessions, EXTERNREMINDER=reminder event for stale session in external processiong state. Session-ID will be supplied as request-parameter 'sessionid'.

serversideCallbackContenttype.description: Encoding to use for the payload data when sending the serversideCallbacks (aka Webhooks) when PUT or POST are used as 'serversidecallback.method'. Use 'json' for application/json and 'form' for application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Since 3.50

serversideCallbackMethod.description: HTTP Method to use when sending the serversideCallbacks (aka Webhooks). When PUT or POST are used, the parameters are sent in the Request-Body instead of URL-Parameters. The property 'serversidecallback.contenttype' can then be used to choose the encoding of the body. Since 3.50

sesSignBatchEditor.description: Allow signing multiple documents with SES in batch mode in the inSign editor. Usage is discouraged because of doubts about legal validity of batch signatures by untrained end user.

sessionid.description: Session id. Note: Required only for reconfigureSession

showHinweisExitNichtFertig.description: Show alert message when user tries to finish a session that can not yet be finished (e.g. if there are missing signatures)

signColor.description: Color for the Signatures of this session.Should be Hexcode like #FF0000. Since 3.44

signTimestampColor.description: Color for the date in the signature as hex of format '#000000'. Overrides application wide setting pdf.signature.date.color. since v3.32.

signTimestampEnabled.description: This value decides whether a datetime-stamp is stamped on top of the signature-field when signing a document

signTimestampFont.description: Font for the date in the signature. Overrides application wide setting pdf.signature.date.font. since v3.32.

signTimestampFontSize.description: Font size for the date in the signature. Overrides application wide setting pdf.signature.date.fontSize. since v3.32.

signTimestampFontStyle.description: Font style for the date in the signature. Valid values are 'bold', 'italic and 'plain'. Overrides application wide setting pdf.signature.date.fontStyle. since v3.32.

sigtagsScanMapping.description: For a sigtag a mapping to map the found data-group to other values.A mapping looks like regex->replacement. The java syntax for regex is applied and replacement can use capture groups.An example could look like 'Q(.*)->\"signatureLevel\": \"QES\", \"role\": \"$1\"'

foruser.description: Owner ID of this session. Must be unambiguously mapped to the owning user (i.e. userid of the user starting this session)

serverSidecallbackURL.description: This webhook will be called (HTTP-GET) from the inSign server on any event regarding this session. The eventID will be passed as URL-parameter 'eventid'. Possible eventIDs are EXTERNBEARBEITUNGFERTIG=all external users have finished editing, VORGANGABGESCHLOSSEN=session has been finished, SIGNATURERSTELLT=signature has ben created, SESSIONREMINDER=reminder event for stale sessions, EXTERNREMINDER=reminder event for stale session in external processiong state. Session-ID will be supplied as request-parameter 'sessionid'.

anrede.description: Form of address for this signature field

displayname.description: Functional role for the signature (Who is supposed to sign here). The text is displayed on the signature pad and in acrobat reader. If empty the technical role will be used here.

gebdat.description: Date of birth for this signature field

id.description: Signatur ID, must be distinct per document

posindex.description: Order of the signatures in the PDF and for the client(UI). Spaces or duplicates aren't a problem. The position (page,y,x) is used as a secondary criteria for sorting

position.description: Position of the signature in the PDF by reference or coordinates

provider.description: Only relevant if signatureLevel=QES. Which provider should be used for QES. Allowed values: QES provider. Only valid and used if is QES. Allowed values: ATrust, Bundesdruckerei, IDnow, Yes, LTID, Evrotrust, Swisscom_ZertES or Swisscom_eIDAS

role.description: Technical role for the signature (Who is supposed to sign here)

signatureLevel.description: Legal level of signature. Allowed values: 'SES', 'AES' and 'QES. Default: 'null' - Will use first non null of session or global default level.

signatureStampType.description: Type of signature stamp for the signature field. Only relevant if signatureLevel is 'SES', 'AESSMS' or 'QES' (with a provider other than 'IDNow' or 'Bundesdruckerei without hash signing') and signature stamp upload is allowed for the session.  Allowed values: NO_SIGNATURESTAMP, OPTIONAL_SIGNATURESTAMP, REQUIRED_SIGNATURESTAMP

stampType.description: Type of stamp for the signature field. Only relevant if signatureLevel is not 'QES' or the provider is not 'IDNow' or 'Bundesdruckerei without hash signing' and stamp upload is allowed for the session.  Allowed values: NO_STAMP, OPTIONAL_STAMP, REQUIRED_STAMP

textsearch.description: Scan the documents content for this text and re-calculate the positions and number of fields according to to matches. The meaning of coordinates given in 'position' will change in this case. These x0 and y0 are now meant to be offsets to the match-positions lower left corner. Use trailing and/or leading spaces to avoid 'N2' to be found in 'N25'. The value must be a valid Java regular expression. See more Info regarding this feature at https://bsi-software.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IKB/pages/57540908/3.2+Documentation+for+external+requests

$PairingCode - der Code für das Pairing zwischen inSign und Browser.

$KundeName - der Name des Kunden.
$BeraterName - der Name des Beraters.

applosPerTouch.description: Determines if the user can sign without the app directly on the device being used. If this value is true, it overrides all signature options for the user. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONSignConfig.applosPerTouch.

applosSmsText.description:
SMS-Text für die SMS in welcher der Link für das Unterschreiben ohne inSign-App enthalten ist.
Es stehen die gleichen Variablen wie bei dem Flag "applosMailText" zu verfügung. Auch die Regeln bezüglich des Links sind wie bei dem Flag "applosMailText" since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONSignConfig.applosSmsText.

beraterPairingTemporary.description: Legt fest, ob das Pairing des Beraterhandys nur für die Session gilt. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONSignConfig.beraterPairingTemporary

documentEmailDownload.description: This value determines if e-mails should contain a download link for the documents instead of the documents as an attachment. since v2.3

emailEmpfaenger.description: Default value email recipient. If not otherwise specified here, the value from the user configuration (i.e. LDAP) or from the properties is used. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.emailEmpfaenger.

emailEmpfaengerBCC.description: Default value for additional e-mail recipients (BCC). This e-mail address isn't visible in the GUI. If no value is specified here, the value from the properties is used since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.emailEmpfaengerBCC.

emailEmpfaengerKopie.description: Default value for additional e-mail recipients (CC). If not otherwise specified here, the value from the user configuration (i.e. LDAP) or from the properties is used. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.emailEmpfaengerKopie.

emailEmpfaengerReadOnly.description: Sets the recipient e-mail to read only if an address is passed by API or Admin Settings. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.emailEmpfaengerReadOnly.

empfaengerBCCExtern.description: Default value for additional external editing e-mail recipients (BCC). This e-mail address isn't visible in the GUI. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerBCCExtern.

empfaengerCCExtern.description: Default value for additional external editing e-mail recipients (CC). since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerCCExtern.

empfaengerExtern.description: Default e-mail address for external editing. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerExtern.

empfaengerReadOnlyExtern.description: Sets the external editing e-mail address to read only if a value was passed by API or the admin settings. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerReadOnlyExtern.

empfaengerSMS.description: Default value sms recipient. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerSMS.

empfaengerSMSExtern.description: Default SMS recipient for external editing. since v3.6. replacement: de.is2.sign.service.rest.json.JSONDeliveryConfig.empfaengerSMSExtern.

externEmailBetreff.description: Betreff der Email zur Externen Bearbeitung.

externEmailInhalt.description: Inhalt der Email zur Externen Bearbeitung.

externHinweisFertig.description: Changes the displayed value when external editing is completed

externHinweisFertigKeinBerater.description: Changes the displayed value when external editing is completed

externHinweisFertigKeineMail.description: Changes the displayed value when external editing is completed

externPhotoUploadEnabled.description: Enable upload of photo documents for external users. since v3.6.

externUploadEnabled.description: Enable upload of arbitrary documents for external users

guiProperties.description:
Map of UI configuration values. You may also override any application text from mymessages.properties here. Use message.<messageid> or <language>.message.<messageid> as key, where language is de,en,fr and alike. You can find all valid messageids in mymessages.properties. Valid values: 
|key (coresponding global property)|description
|----------------------------------|-----------
|quicktipsTutorialEnabled (quicktips.tutorial.enabled)|Should Quick-Tips tutorial be displayed? Only relevant if quicktips.enabled=true
|guiNoGPS (gui.noGPS)|Should the location of tablets/mobile devices NOT be queried in the browser?
|settingsSaveForAutocompleteAvailable (settings.saveForAutocomplete.available)|Should the "E-Mail cache" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?            Works only if "mail.saveForAutocompleteFilter" is set.
|guiOnnextopentosign (gui.onnextopentosign)|When clicking on "next signature" or on the external guidance arrow in the PDF editor, immediately open the pairing dialog?        
|vorgangsverwaltungExternDelayReminderAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.extern.delay.reminder.available)|Should the "Send reminder" option be available in the process management? This option is shown only for processes where extern.per.sms=false and the statuses are "Signature requested" or "To edit".
|settingsExternMultiShowOtherSignaturefieldsAvailable (settings.extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields.available)|Should "Email address visibility" be available in the Settings to all gallery users? Can be configured on a global level with extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields. For more details look at the description there.
|vorgangsverwaltungDownloadBiometricDocsAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.downloadBiometricDocs.available)|Should the option "Download incl. signature data" be available in the process management?        
|helpAvailable (help.available)|Is the action "help" available?
|addMarkFavDefault (add.mark.fav.default)|Is the "Add Marker" action favored?
|vorgangsverwaltungActionAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.action.available)|Is the action "Process Manager" available?
|finishFile (finish.file)|Is the action "Deliver by data carrier at completion of transaction" available?
|aushaendigenMustbereadAvailable (aushaendigen.mustberead.available)|Is the action "Hand over mandatory documents" available?
|finishAvailable (finish.available)|Is the "Complete process" action available?
|settingsImprintLinkAvailable (settings.imprintLink.available)|Should the "Imprint Link" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|changeSessionNameOnFirstUpload (change.session.name.on.first.upload)|If set to true then the session name would be changed with the first upload name
|guiDisableMonitorChoice (gui.disableMonitorChoice)|Should the manual screen selection be suppressed?
|saveAsTemplateAvailable (save.as.template.available)|Is the action "Save as template" available?
|externUserGuidance (extern.user.guidance)|Should the external user be guided through the signing process? Requires 'gui.afterSignOpenNextSignatureField=false'
|addFotoFavDefault (add.foto.fav.default)|Is the action "Photograph document" favored?
|externDelegateAvailable (extern.delegate.available)|Is the action "Delegate" available for a customer? With the delegate Action a customer can redirect the process to another person.
|settingsRealLocationAvailable (settings.realLocation.available)|Should the "Location" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users? This setting requires that "Timestamp" is also available, otherwise nothing will be printed.
|vorgangsverwaltungDeleteAvailable (vorgangsverwaltung.delete.available)|Should the "Delete" option be available in the process management?
|guiAfterSignOpenNextSignatureField (gui.afterSignOpenNextSignatureField)|When clicking on "next signature" in the PDF editor, switch to signature mode immediately and open            the next signature field immediately after the signature has been completed.        
|nextSignFavDefault (next.sign.fav.default)|Is the action "Next signature" favored?
|zoomFavDefault (zoom.fav.default)|Is the action "Zoom in, zoom out" favored?
|externDeleteLastSignature (extern.deleteLastSignature)|Extern-User has the abilty to delete his last signature. Not possible for multi signature.
|guiFertigbuttonSkipModalDialog (gui.fertigbutton.skipModalDialog)|If you click on "Done", no modal dialog is displayed.
|sessionExternAddformfieldUserdecision (session.extern.addformfield.userdecision)|Is the consultant allowed to activate / deactivate functionality to add formfields for external users. Only allows editing of textfields and checkboxes. addformfield.available must be true.
|searchAvailable (search.available)|Is the action "Next signature text" available?
|guiEmbeddedHotspotdisabled (gui.embedded.hotspotdisabled)|Disable all features for hotspot (embeddedMode only)
|formfieldSizeAes (formfield.size.aes)|            The default and minimal sizes for AES (handwriting) signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|formfieldSizeAessms (formfield.size.aessms)|            The default and minimal sizes for AESSMS (text input with mobile number verification) signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|guiHintAllsigned (gui.hint.allsigned)|Show hint popup for saving after last signature?
|dualscreenGuiAvailable (dualscreen.gui.available)|Is the action "Dualscreen" available? THIS Property is unfinished. Don't use it!
|settingsAvailable (settings.available)|Is the "Settings" action available?
|guiHintAllsignedSkipSaveDialog (gui.hint.allsigned.skipSaveDialog)|Don't show hint popup for saving after last signature and jump directly to final dialog instead?        
|guiTemplateWeblinkAvailable (gui.template.weblink.available)|This feature requires the license "weblink".            Process manager / Gallery: Allow the creation of "weblinks", i.e. embeddable links to templates where users can start a process themselves.        
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionDefault (password.transmission.userdecision.default)|The default selection for the user decision dropdown
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionAlternativemail_enabled (password.transmission.userdecision.alternativemail_enabled)|Should 'password via email' be an option given to the user? When the user selects this, the password will be sent via email.
|systemcheckIgnoreconnect (systemcheck.ignoreconnect)|Check the connection to the local instance. True will do the check, false will disable it.
|settingsPrivacyLinkAvailable (settings.privacyLink.available)|Should the "Privacy Link" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|quicktipsEnabled (quicktips.enabled)|Should Quick-Tips be displayed?
|settingsCompanystampUploadAvailable (settings.companystamp.upload.available)|Should the "Companystamp upload" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|documentVisibilityRegex (document.visibility.regex)|            Default visibility rules based on pairs {docregex},{recipientregex} separated by semicolon.            Only relevant if document.visibility.available is true.            Documents whose display name matches a {docregex} will only be visible to signatories matching {recipientregex}.            However, signatories can always see the documents they are assigned to.            Documents that do not match a {docregex} will be visible to all recipients.            Example: invisible.*,onlyme@example.org;.*partvisibile.*,.*@example.org;noone.*,        
|consultantRenameDocuments (consultant.rename.documents)|Is the Consultant allowed to rename documents? Not possible for sessions via API.
|settingsForcedSigfieldsAvailable (settings.forced.sigfields.available)|Should the "Mandatory Fields" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|nextSignAvailable (next.sign.available)|Is the "Next Signature" action available?
|externMultiOrderDefault (extern.multi.order.default)|If extern.multi.available = true, then the order should be specified. Default is false (no            order).            Note: If the QES button is favoured in the session, then through online editing the signatures will be availed to each extern user in order.            Hence, extern.multi.available = true is always considered and the property value will be ignored.        
|pageOverlayAvailable (page.overlay.available)|Is the "No release" action for the process creator available?
|searchFavDefault (search.fav.default)|Is the action "Next signature text" favored?
|guiLeavepagewarning (gui.leavepagewarning)|Show a warning in the browser when leaving the page?
|transmissionUserdecisionGroup (transmission.userdecision.group)|Will be removed in an upcoming version. Enables userdecision and no password option for members of the specified groups regardless of the password.transmission.userdecision setting. Multiple groups can be split by ",". For SAML the groups before mapping will be applied.
|sessionExternFormfillingUserdecision (session.extern.formfilling.userdecision)|Is the consultant allowed to activate / deactivate functionality to enable form filling for external users. This overwrites extern.edit.allowed
|burgerAvailable (burger.available)|Is the "More Functions" dropdown in the sidebar for non favorite actions available? In mobile view the burger will always be available but only contain favorite actions if this is disabled.
|passwordTransmissionUserdecision (password.transmission.userdecision)|Should the user be able to choose the way in which the password is sent? If no Option is active it will be treated as if all options are active. Will override extern.per.sms, sendtan.sms and sendtan.muendlich. mail.zip has to be true to prevent password protecting signed PDFs because this would invalidate the signatures. session.aushaendigenpflicht has to be set to false.
|settingsMaskAuditreportAvailable (settings.mask.auditreport.available)|Should "Email address masking" be available in the Settings to all gallery users?
|settingsSignaturestampUploadAvailable (settings.signaturestamp.upload.available)|Should the "Signature upload" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|addformfieldAllowAesSms (addformfield.allowAesSms)|Can signature fields be created that only require text input (mobile number verification involved)? In those fields the user can sign a document by only putting in his name.        
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionSms_enabled (password.transmission.userdecision.sms_enabled)|Should 'password via SMS' be an option given to the user? When the user selects this, the password will be sent via sms after the link is clicked.
|nextMarkFavDefault (next.mark.fav.default)|Is the "Next selection" action favored?
|aushaendigenSms (aushaendigen.sms)|Is the "Deliver documents by SMS" action available? This option is only allowed if            sendtan.sms=true. For SMS messages the mode document.email.download=true is always used, because SMS cannot            contain attachments. If there is an obligation to confirm the delivery (flag handset obligation to confirm            at the interface), the mode handset.confirm.mode=download is always used for sending SMS messages.        
|dualscreenFavDefault (dualscreen.fav.default)|Is the action "Dualscreen" favored?
|formfieldSizeQesIdnow (formfield.size.qes.idnow)|            The default and minimal sizes for QES IDNow signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|quicktipsResetDays (quicktips.reset.days)|            After how many days will Standard Quick-Tips that were disabled by clicking the 'X' be active again?            You can also enter whole minutes as decimal places, where 0.00347, for example, corresponds to 5 minutes.            Only relevant if quicktips.enabled=true. Not applicable for Tutorial Quick-Tips.        
|settingsTrustlinkAvailable (settings.trustlink.available)|Should the "Trustlink" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|addDocFavDefault (add.doc.fav.default)|Is the action "Add document" favored?
|addformfieldAllowQes (addformfield.allowQes)|Can signature fields be created that require a qualified signature? The user needs the role INSIGN_USER_QES in addition to this property.        
|aushaendigenMustbereadFavDefault (aushaendigen.mustberead.fav.default)|Is the action "Hand over mandatory documents" favoured?
|addformfieldAvailable (addformfield.available)|Is the "Add form fields" mode available? true=automatic, false=not available?
|exitAvailable (exit.available)|Is the Close action available?
|settingsTimestampAvailable (settings.timestamp.available)|Should the "Timestamp" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|vorgangDialogAvailable (vorgang.dialog.available)|Show a menu for the process which allows various things like editing the name and changing settings.
|guiAutoRetrieveProcess (gui.auto.retrieveProcess)|Should the "Set expiration date" option be available in the request signature modal? Requires the "extern.autofinish" cronjob to be enabled
|addformfieldAllowSes (addformfield.allowSes)|Can signature fields be created that only require text input? In those fields the user can sign a document by only putting in his name.        
|vorgangsverwaltungActionFavDefault (vorgangsverwaltung.action.fav.default)|Is the "Process Manager" action favored?
|aushaendigenPaper (aushaendigen.paper)|Is the "Deliver documents on paper" action available?
|saveAsTemplateFavDefault (save.as.template.fav.default)|Is the "Save as template" action favored?
|settingsSubstituteAvailable (settings.substitute.available)|Should the option to select a substitute be available in the settings modal (for vacation etc.). This is only applies to processes owned by the user, not ones assigned by other users.
|finishMail (finish.mail)|Is the action "Hand over by e-mail on completion of transaction" available?
|vorgangsverwaltungPrivateProcessGroup (vorgangsverwaltung.private.process.group)|Only users with a group that matches this regular expression can mark their processes as private. Allows all users if empty. Only works if vorgangsverwaltung.private.process is enabled.
|aushaendigenFavDefault (aushaendigen.fav.default)|Is the action "Hand over documents" favoured?
|addFormFavDefault (add.form.fav.default)|Is the action "Add form fields" favored?
|finishFavDefault (finish.fav.default)|Is the action "Complete process" favored?
|serialProcessFavDefault (serial.process.fav.default)|Is the "Serial process" function preferred?
|internetExplorerRestriction (internet.explorer.restriction)|If this is enabled, the Internet Explorer browser will no longer be supported by inSign in order to prevent broken user interfaces. Default is unsupported.
|documentVisibilityAvailable (document.visibility.available)|Is the process owner allowed to set the visibility of documents? If this feature is enabled, setting visibilityRuleRegexpList via API per document is not allowed.
|guiActionFinishIgnoresignstatus (gui.action.finish.ignoresignstatus)|If you click on "Finish process", do ignore the message that not all signature fields have been            signed yet.        
|settingsForcecolorAvailable (settings.forcecolor.available)|Should the "Color" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|vorgangsverwaltungPrivateProcess (vorgangsverwaltung.private.process)|Can the user mark a shared process as private? A private process cannot be edited or downloaded. Visibility of private processes depends on vorgangsverwaltung.private.process.visible. Only affects processes shared in a group by enabling group.mapping.use.integrated.
|useradminPasswordExpirationDisplay (useradmin.passwordExpiration.display)|Should the password expiration option be displayed in the useradmin panel?        
|aushaendigenDialogEditable (aushaendigen.dialog.editable)|Should the displayed dialog when handing out documents or completing a process have editable input fields?        
|nextMarkAvailable (next.mark.available)|Is the Next Marker action available?
|batchSignatureAvailable (batch.signature.available)|Should it be possible to sign multiple processes at once in the Standalone View?        
|deleteSignFavDefault (delete.sign.fav.default)|Is the action "Delete signature" favored?
|settingsNameAvailable (settings.name.available)|Should the gallery user be able to change their name in the settings modal?
|aushaendigenMustbereadIgnoreSignature (aushaendigen.mustberead.ignore.signature)|Once a signature is done in a document the mustberead-status will not reset, even if other signatures are added
|addMarkAvailable (add.mark.available)|Is the "Add Marker" action available?
|settingsOwnMailasSenderAvailable (settings.ownMailasSender.available)|Should the "Use own e-mail as sender address" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|pageOverlayFavDefault (page.overlay.fav.default)|Is the action "No release" for the process creator favored?
|exitResetSignature (exit.reset.signature)|Should signatures be reset, when exit is used?
|externMultiShowOtherSignaturefields (extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields)|Display signature fields of other user while using extern. If false pdf.signature.aes.includepersonaldata will be ignored for extern signatures and no personal data is included. Can be configured on a per user basis with settings.extern.multi.showOtherSignaturefields.available
|aesSignBatchEditor (aes.sign.batch.editor)|Allow signing multiple documents with AES in batch mode in the inSign editor. Usage is discouraged because of doubts about legal validity of batch signatures by untrained end user.
|guiActionOverrideTextfieldwarning (gui.action.override.textfieldwarning)|Can the user sign a document if there are still unfilled text fields?
|settingsAuditreportAvailable (settings.auditreport.available)|Should the "Audit report" setting be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|hideApisessionsInVvw (hide.apisessions.in.vvw)|Should processes, which where created over the API, be hidden in the Process Management?
|formfieldSizeSes (formfield.size.ses)|            The default and minimal sizes for SES (text input) signature fields when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|aushaendigenAvailable (aushaendigen.available)|Is the "Deliver documents" action available?
|zoomAvailable (zoom.available)|Is the "Zoom in, zoom out" action available?
|saveDocAvailable (save.doc.available)|Is the action "Save document" available for the consultant?
|serialProcessAvailable (serial.process.available)|This activates the "Serial process" function. 
|restarchiveSettingsAvailable (restarchive.settings.available)|Is the action "Archive Settings" available? Only relevant if restarchive.enabled=true
|signAvailable (sign.available)|Is the "Sign" mode available? true=automatic, false=not available
|externExitEnabled (extern.exit.enabled)|            Is the "Close" action also possible for external users? If yes, make sure to provide a proper callbackurl for the external users.            Requires "exit.available" and "exit.fav.default" to be enabled.        
|pdfSaveAlert (pdf.save.alert)|If true show success toast after save.
|externAvailable (extern.available)|Is the action "Have the process processed externally" available?
|externUseDomain (extern.use.domain)|Should users who are part of the extern.domain or are present in the Useradmin see their external processes in the process manager?  Otherwise, fallback to security.ad.domain. If this property and document.email.download are true, handovers to mails with an associated user account will require their user account to download documents.
|formfieldSizeQes (formfield.size.qes)|            The default and minimal sizes for QES signature fields (except IDNow) when editing via the form editor.            Format: defaultWidth,defaultHeight,minWidth,minHeight        
|guiAllowChangeSmsEmail (gui.allow.change.smsEmail)|            Is the user allowed to change phone numbers and email addresses that are supplied via API by using signConfig.applosKundePerEmailEmpfaenger or signConfig.applosKundePerSmsEmpfaenger?            Relevant for customer signature pairing by sms or e-mail.        
|keepmessagetokens (keepmessagetokens)|Show messagekeys instead of resolved messages to find the keys you want to customize.
|vorgangsverwaltungPrivateProcessDefault (vorgangsverwaltung.private.process.default)|Initial private value for new processes. Only works if vorgangsverwaltung.private.process is enabled.
|customerFocusSigField (customerFocusSigField)|Navigates to first signature field for USER customer
|passwordTransmissionUserdecisionNopassword_enabled (password.transmission.userdecision.nopassword_enabled)|Should 'no password' be an option given to the user? When the user selects this, a password will not have to be entered for the selected process.
|settingsQuicktipsResetAvailable (settings.quicktips.reset.available)|Should the Reset button for "Tutorial & Tips" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?
|guiFertigbuttonSkipModalDialogExtern (gui.fertigbutton.skipModalDialogExtern)|If you click on "Done" in external mode, no modal dialog is displayed.
|guiProgressOptional (gui.progress.optional)|PDF Editor: Displays an additional line for optional signature fields - if available. Otherwise            only one counter is displayed if only mandatory fields are available.        
|guiUpdateThumbSignHint (gui.updateThumbSignHint)|Displays additional markers for signature fields in the thumb
|deleteSignAvailable (delete.sign.available)|Is the action "Delete signature" available?

|exitFavDefault (exit.fav.default)|Is the "[Editor] Close" action favored?
|guiFertigbuttonModalDialogExternSkipSendMail (gui.fertigbutton.ModalDialogExtern.skipSendMail)|Remove the Option "send by mail" from the final dialog for customers?

|navtoolbarAvailable (navtoolbar.available)|Should the navigation toolbar be shown in the editor.
|restarchiveSettingsFavDefault (restarchive.settings.fav.default)|Is the action "Archive Settings" favored? Only relevant if restarchive.enabled=true
|addformfieldFoto (addformfield.foto)|Can the user place image annotations via the formeditor?
|saveDocFavDefault (save.doc.fav.default)|Is the action "Save document" favored for the consultant?
|guiProgressEnabled (gui.progress.enabled)|Process manager: progress, number of signed signatures, document / transaction display? In            the case of clustering, nothing is displayed in process management.

|finishPaper (finish.paper)|Is the "Deliver by paper at transaction close" action available?
|aushaendigenForceNoPassword (aushaendigen.force.NoPassword)|This will override the password transmission of a handout user and always set it to no password. This way the documents will not get password protected.

|vorgangsverwaltungPagesize (vorgangsverwaltung.pagesize)|How many results are shown on each page in the process management.
|settingsLogoUploadAvailable (settings.logo.upload.available)|Should the "Firm Logo-upload" be available in the settings modal for gallery users?

rollenZuPrimaerUnterschrift.description: If the unterschriftenRollenbasiertAktiv flag is active, this flag specifies which technical signature roles should use the primary signature method (consultant or logged in permanent end user). A * can be used here as a wildcard, for all roles that cannot otherwise be assigned. If the field is passed with null, the fields already defined when the session was created will be used. If an empty array is passed, the previous roles are overwritten.

rollenZuSekundaerUnterschrift.description: If the unterschriftenRollenbasiertAktiv flag is active, this flag specifies which technical signature roles should use the secondary (customer or similar) signature method. A * can be used here as a wildcard, for all roles that can not otherwise be assigned. If the field is passed with null, the fields already defined when the session was created will be used. If an empty array is passed, the previous roles are overwritten.
